summary: Tested Globe click interactions after parameter fix. Backend APIs working, Globe renders correctly with visible events, hover tooltips work, but click interactions still broken. Deeper issue than parameter naming conflict.

minor_bugs.issue: Returns HTML instead of JSON API response
minor_bugs.impact: Root endpoint serves frontend, but /api/health works correctly

ui_bugs.issue: onPointClick handler not executing despite parameter fix from 'event' to 'evt'
ui_bugs.description: Hover tooltips work (proving events are detectable), 8 ACLED red markers visible, but clicking them doesn't trigger popup with 'Simulate ASX Impact' button
ui_bugs.debug_info: Hover works + events detectable + canvas interactive, but onPointClick callback not executing. Issue deeper than parameter naming conflict.

passed_tests: Backend /api/data/acled returns 8 events correctly (5/6 API tests passed)
Backend /api/data/port-hedland returns HIGH congestion with 14 vessels
Frontend loads with Market Oracle AI title and proper layout
Globe renders 3D Earth with night sky background
8 ACLED conflict events visible as red markers on globe
ASX ticker strip shows all 5 tickers with live prices and changes
Port Hedland badge displays 'Port HedlandHIGH14 vessels' in header
Instructions section present with Iran/Strait of Hormuz demo tip
Hover tooltips work on globe events (proves event detection functional)
action_item_for_main_agent: Globe click interactions still broken after parameter fix. Hover works but onPointClick handler not executing. Need to debug Globe.js onPointClick callback binding or React state update issues. The 'event' to 'evt' parameter fix was insufficient.

success_percentage.backend: 83% (5/6 tests passed - same minor root endpoint issue)
success_percentage.frontend: 85% (hover works now + all UI loads, but critical click interaction still broken)
